extracted_information: The web content analyzes and reviews four cannabis AI budtender software solutions for dispensary websites: Spark Budtender, StrainBrain, Terpli, and Pluggi. It details their features, recommendation accuracy, user experience, and underlying technology. AI budtenders are presented as digital assistants that personalize cannabis shopping by offering tailored recommendations based on user preferences, especially for online orders where traditional budtenders are unavailable. The article aims to help dispensaries choose the best solution.

Spark Budtender.AI_Usage: Does NOT use AI. Employs an algorithm to filter products based on menu information.
Spark Budtender.Recommendation_Engine: Filters products from dispensary menu. Algorithm uses product category, effects, terpene profiles, and product descriptions for recommendations. Provides significantly more accurate recommendations due to not using AI, which is deemed to create more margin for error by the author.

Chatbot_Capabilities.Functionality: Keeps things simple, filters based on preferences.
Chatbot_Capabilities.Dynamic_Features: Preference buttons are dynamic; filters won't appear if no matching product on menu.
Chatbot_Capabilities.Quick_Shop_Feature: Allows quick exploration of common menu filters (e.g., 'highest THC flower', 'most popular vape carts', 'lowest-priced gummies').
Chatbot_Capabilities.User_Experience: Fast, easy to scroll back and change preferences, easier to explore new products than regular online menu.
Chatbot_Capabilities.Customization: Customizable button icon, message, button and text colors.

StrainBrain.Recommendation_Engine: Matches products to preferences, shows percentage of product match accuracy.

Chatbot_Capabilities.User_Experience: Good, very visual, easy to click preferences.
Chatbot_Capabilities.Messaging: Chatbot word bubble button explains its purpose.
Chatbot_Capabilities.Drawbacks: Intrusive 'loyalty sign-up' form before recommendations, paid promotion feature for products (defeats purpose of accurate recommendations).

Terpli.AI_Usage: Uses AI to analyze product data from its database of COAs and private customer reviews.
Terpli.Recommendation_Engine: AI-powered, combines COA data and private customer reviews for recommendations. Integrates with loyalty programs for personalized recommendations based on past orders and reviews.

Chatbot_Capabilities.User_Experience: Slick UX design, simple user experience, quick preference selection (approx. 20 seconds).
Chatbot_Capabilities.Loyalty_Integration: Integrates with top dispensary loyalty program providers, incentivizes sign-ups, allows tracking previous orders, leaving private reviews, receiving personalized recommendations.

Known_Issues: Effects on recommendations don't always match desired effects selected in chatbot.
Price range selection sometimes ignored (e.g., selecting $0-$25 yields $50 products).

Pluggi.Recommendation_Engine: Provides three product recommendations. Accuracy noted as 'Poor'.

Chatbot_Capabilities.User_Experience: Super simple chatbot layout, easy to use, no intrusive email signup forms or ads.
Issues_Observed: Broken product links (redirects to category page or 'error page').
Inaccurate recommendations (e.g., recommends 'gas and cheese flavors' when citrus was preferred).

pricing.Spark Budtender: $50-$99 per month, 30-day free trial, no setup fees.

features: AI budtender chatbot software for dispensary websites.
Understand user preferences and offer tailored recommendations.
Designed to be easy to use for non-tech users.

statistics.Online_Purchases: Some dispensaries get over 70% of purchases from online orders.
